title: Verify 'Remind me' toggle functionality
description: Test that the user can successfully enable and disable the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle.
preconditions: User is on the Trial Corner screen

steps.description: 1. Locate the 'Remind me...' toggle in the 'Manage Trial' section
2. Click the toggle to turn it ON
3. Verify the toggle state changes to ON
4. Click the toggle again to turn it OFF
5. Verify the toggle state changes to OFF

expected_result: The toggle state updates correctly upon each click, and the corresponding API call is made.
